programmes.show_description: Latest news from the world of entertainment.
Sci-fi comedy film starring Simon Pegg and Nick Frost, 2013. Five friends recreate an epic pub crawl from 20 years earlier, but not everything about their hometown is as it seems.
Raised by Another: American drama following the survivors of a plane crash. Flashbacks reveal Claire's backstory as she has a horribly realistic nightmare about her new baby.
Back in Good Old England: Comedy-drama series. Terry's pleasure at seeing 'Oily' Wragg again is cut short by the appearance of some less friendly faces from the past.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the best series.
Shopping from home.
A look back at the wide variety of sports covered by ITV during the 1980s - from football to wrestling and double decker bus racing to boxing - that includes many iconic moments.
Brian Moore introduces highlights from September 1977 featuring QPR v Manchester City, Crystal Palace v Sheffield United, and Wolverhampton Wanderers v West Bromwich Albion.
Brian Moore hosts action from the 1984/85 football season including Sunderland vs Queens Park Rangers, Brighton and Hove Albion vs Manchester City, and Dundee United vs St Mirren.
Ms Jones: Classic US action drama series. The ever-chivalrous Thomas steps in to help a distraught civil servant search for her husband who has vanished in mysterious circumstances.
On the Edge: Classic US detective drama. An ageing detective with a troubled home life is obsessed with cracking a high-profile case, but Theo fears that his fixation will cost him.
Big Game Hunt: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Harry arranges for a secret society to hold a meeting at Woodcote Park, and Ken is asked to follow and watch a client's wife.
Tomorrow Man: Classic '70s police drama series. Regan is assigned to ensure the safe shipment of a gold bullion consignment threatened by the plans of a brilliant computer expert.
Tequila Sunrise: Classic detective series. Extortion and blackmail lead to a man being murdered, an old friend of Makepeace's being badly injured, and Makepeace taking Dempsey home.
The Man from Marseilles: Classic US action drama series. Thomas teams up with a Frenchman who is claiming to be the world-famous detective profiled in Robin's latest book.
A Wind from Corsica: Classic US detective drama. A convict uses a medical experiment as a chance to escape to New York, but he does not realise that he is carrying a deadly virus.
Barbour Jackets and Fire Extinguishers: Discover how an innovative fire extinguisher is saving lives, then see the care and attention that goes into making a Barbour waxed jacket.
Katie Shanahan presents coverage as England's Lionesses get their qualifying campaign for the FIFA Women's World Cup in Brazil in 2027 under way against Ukraine.
Russian Killer: Extreme fisherman Jeremy heads to Russia's remote Amur river to investigate the mysterious deaths of three men and their links to a reclusive freshwater giant.
Documentary series following members of the M-Sport World Rally Championship team as they face the trials and tribulations of competing in rally driving at the highest level.
Killer Pass: Nail-biting documentary series. Heavy haul veterans Jack Jessee and Carey Hill make time for practical jokes while taking two multi-purpose storage tanks to Deadhorse.
Hard-hitting action from AEW's newest show, featuring stars including Ricochet, Chris Jericho, Kris Statlander, Darby Allin and Claudio Castagnoli.
The Alien: Classic comedy-drama series set in Germany. When the boys have problems with a hard-drinking troublemaker, Neville comes up with an ingenious solution to get rid of him.
Rocky Eight and a Half: Drama series about the shady dealings of a loveable rogue. Arthur uses all his persuasive powers to cajole Terry into donning his boxing gloves once more.
The concluding part of the compelling whodunnit series. Shardlake faces a stark choice after uncovering the history behind the murder weapon and the true owner of the sword.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.
Shopping from home.
A look back at the wide variety of sports covered by ITV during the 1970s - from horse racing to table football and Formula One to darts - that includes many memorable moments.
Brian Moore presents footballing action from October 1977 featuring Leyton Orient v Tottenham Hotspur at Brisbane Road, Sunderland v Brighton, and Ipswich Town v Newcastle United.
Brian Moore hosts highlights from October 1977 as Queens Park Rangers take on Everton, Stoke City face Crystal Palace, and Liverpool play Chelsea at Anfield.
The Man from Marseilles: Classic US action drama series. Thomas teams up with a Frenchman who is claiming to be the world-famous detective profiled in Robin's latest book.
A Wind from Corsica: Classic US detective drama. A convict uses a medical experiment as a chance to escape to New York, but he does not realise that he is carrying a deadly virus.
Don't Buy from Me Argentina: Classic drama. Ken finds himself investigating an insurance swindle involving an Argentine polo team, and Rocky is put in charge of a valuable painting.
Taste of Fear: Classic '70s police series. A new recruit joins the Sweeney in time to investigate a violent burglary by a group of ex-soldiers, but Regan doesn't think he's up to it.
Blood Money: Classic detective series. The duo probe the connections between a murdered antiques dealer and an Arab embassy official with diplomatic immunity after a robbery.
Torah! Torah! Torah!: Classic US action drama series. Thomas probes the theft of a rare edition of the Jewish holy book the Torah and is aided by a policewoman chasing smugglers.
Bad Dude: Classic US detective drama. A private detective sets himself up as a potential target for a hired killer and does not take kindly to Theo's attempts to rescue him.
All in a Day's Pork: Classic drama. While Ken is hired to find out who has been taking Dictaphone tapes from a meat company, he also uncovers a plot to import pornographic material.
Bad Apple: When a convicted criminal grasses up a group of CID officers involved in bribery, Regan and Carter go undercover to investigate the corruption charges against them.
High Drains Pilferer: Drama series about the shady dealings of a rogue. Terry has the misfortune to be driving for mobster Micky the Fish when his mistress's jewellery is stolen.
Pack of Teeth: Adventurer and extreme fisherman Jeremy Wade journeys into the swamps of southern Africa to investigate stories of a piranha-like fish that hunts in packs.

programmes.show_name: CDR: Real Sociedad v Athletic Club
programmes.show_description: Coverage of 2025-26 Copa del Rey semi-final second-leg action as Real Sociedad play host to Athletic Club in a Basque derby for a place in the Spanish Cup final.
Bond film starring Roger Moore and Jane Seymour, 1973. 007 is sent to New York to investigate a prime minister, a Harlem crime kingpin, and the death of three MI6 agents.
